title: Team Meloque
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Team Meloque''' was the team organized by [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service|Galactic Alliance Intelligence]] to infiltrate [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-occupied [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], following [[Battle of Caluula|the battle]] there. The goal was to sabotage the [[yammosk]] housed there prior to the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Yuuzhan Vong attack]] on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. To that end, they posed as scientists arriving to study the [[Nocturne of the Winged-Stars]]. The team consisted of:<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

*[[Meloque]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Wraw]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Kyp Durron]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Ferfer]]<ref name="TUF" />
*[[Sasso]]<ref name="TUF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
